response.justification: The candidate is a highly experienced senior engineer with strong fundamentals in testing, CI/CD, and systems programming, but his profile does not match this role's core requirements. His C++ experience is limited and dated (a short stint at National Instruments and a thesis project), far from the mandatory 5–10 years of recent hands-on C++ on Windows. His database work centers on MongoDB/MySQL rather than SQL Server/Oracle, and he has no Fixed Income or capital-markets domain experience — RIDE Capital was retail-investment fintech, not investment banking. The gap on both mandatory pillars (recent C++ and financial-markets domain) makes him a poor fit despite his seniority.
strengths: 20+ years of broad software engineering experience, including low-latency systems work (DLang, async I/O, high-throughput services)
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and demonstrated mentorship/knowledge-sharing
Some prior C/C++ exposure (NI LabWindows/CVI components, audio synthesis thesis) and solid Linux/systems background
concerns: No substantial or recent professional C++ experience, and none on the Windows platform as required
No Fixed Income, derivatives, or capital-markets/investment-banking domain experience
SQL background is MySQL/MongoDB-oriented, with no stated SQL Server or Oracle experience

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain knowledge
Strong general engineering seniority and low-latency systems background
